http_curl.name: Make HTTP requests with curl
http_curl.description: Probe fleet services using curl, interpret status codes, and parse JSON responses.

plato_submit.name: Submit tiles to PLATO gate
plato_submit.description: Write and submit tiles to the PLATO knowledge system with proper formatting.

mud_explore.name: Navigate MUD rooms
mud_explore.description: Explore the Cocapn Fleet MUD, map rooms, find hidden exits, and document findings.

repo_audit.name: Audit GitHub repos
repo_audit.description: Clone, inspect, and fix fleet repositories — dead links, missing files, stale content.

guard_compilation.name: Write and compile GUARD constraints
guard_compilation.description: Write safety constraints in GUARD DSL, compile to FLUX-C bytecode, and verify execution.

ci_deployment.name: Deploy CI workflows
ci_deployment.description: Write GitHub Actions workflows, configure branch protection, and debug failing CI.

bottle_write.name: Write fleet bottles
bottle_write.description: Write structured I2I bottles in the fleet protocol and deliver to the correct recipient.

subagent_spawn.name: Spawn and monitor subagents
subagent_spawn.description: Create subagents for specific tasks, track their progress, and harvest results.

service_heal.name: Fix downed services
service_heal.description: Diagnose and restart failed fleet services, patch bugs, and restore connectivity.

fleet_orchestrate.name: Orchestrate fleet-wide operations
fleet_orchestrate.description: Design and coordinate multi-agent operations across the entire fleet.
